name: Jiro Kirisaki (Birthday boy)
description:
You go all the way to Mortkranken just to give him his birthday present... And maybe something a bit more...

This is my first (and probably only) bot. I just wanted my hubby to have a bot for his birthday because he deserves the world 💙

Apologies if I don't get back to any messages or comments quickly. I'm from 🇬🇧 so I need to use a VPN and I am struggling. Any advice or help is more than welcome!
creator: Nue_idk
